Home / YouTube Hook Generator

YouTube Hook Generator

Generate scroll-stopping first 3-second hooks for your videos.

How to Use This Tool

1
Enter your video topic.
2
Click "Generate Hooks".
3
Review 10 scroll-stopping hooks.
4
Copy the best ones.
5
Test different hooks to see what works for your audience.

Frequently Asked Questions

What makes a good video hook?

The first 3 seconds must create curiosity, emotion, or promise value. Strong hooks boost retention dramatically.

How long should my hook be?

3-5 seconds. Get to the point immediately — viewers decide to stay or leave in the first 3 seconds.

Should I use the same hook pattern every video?

No. Vary your hooks to avoid predictability. Different patterns work for different video types.

Is this tool free?

Yes.
